releaseNotes: 1.5.1 - Startup updater before main window, timed auto-dismiss prompt, silent MSI install, and hardened launch stability
Dashboard includes live CPU/GPU/RAM counters and toggleable FPS overlay.
Added profile manager for local JSON save/load and cloud sync bridge.
Added dependency checker, in-app changelog viewer, and one-click game launch shortcuts.
Auto-update flow remains manifest-based and supports silent MSI launch.
